queries.question: Show me the airlines represented at each airport.
queries.sql: SELECT Airlines.Name  from Airports_Airlines join Airlines on Airports_Airlines.AirlineID = Airlines.AirlineID join Airports on Airports_Airlines.AirportID = Airports.AirportID   GROUP BY Airports_Airlines.AirlineID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Airports_Airlines.AirportID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Airports)

queries.question: Show me the airlines represented at each airport.
queries.sql: select airports.name , airlines.name from Airports_Airlines join Airlines on Airports_Airlines.AirlineID = Airlines.AirlineID join Airports on Airports_Airlines.AirportID = Airports.AirportID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?airports_airlines a :Airports_Airlines .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?airports_airlines p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airports_airlines p:hasAirports ?airports .
  ?airports p:name ?name .
  ?airlines p:name ?name2 .
}
